changeSet.author: nexus-7ndh3
changeSet.comment: search_graph_hop_384: add where(jsonb) chunk-metadata containment; replaces the 7-arg catalog-007 version
changeSet.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_graph_hop_384(vector, text[], text[], text, int, text, int); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_graph_hop_384( p_query vector(384), p_seeds text[], p_collections text[], p_link_type text, p_depth int, p_direction text, p_where jsonb, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8, chash text) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ WITH RECURSIVE reach(tumbler, d) AS ( SELECT s, 0 FROM unnest(p_seeds) AS s UNION SELECT CASE WHEN l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler THEN l.to_tumbler ELSE l.from_tumbler END, r.d + 1 FROM reach r JOIN nexus.catalog_links l ON ((p_direction = 'out' AND l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'in' AND l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'both' AND (l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler OR l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler))) WHERE r.d < p_depth AND (p_link_type IS NULL OR l.link_type = p_link_type) ), reached AS (SELECT DISTINCT tumbler FROM reach) SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8, c.chash FROM nexus.chunks_384 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN reached rd ON rd.tumbler = d.tumbler WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p_where IS NULL OR c.metadata @> p_where) ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_graph_hop_384(vector, text[], text[], text, int, text, jsonb, int); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_graph_hop_384( p_query vector(384), p_seeds text[], p_collections text[], p_link_type text, p_depth int, p_direction text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8, chash text) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ WITH RECURSIVE reach(tumbler, d) AS ( SELECT s, 0 FROM unnest(p_seeds) AS s UNION SELECT CASE WHEN l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler THEN l.to_tumbler ELSE l.from_tumbler END, r.d + 1 FROM reach r JOIN nexus.catalog_links l ON ((p_direction = 'out' AND l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'in' AND l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'both' AND (l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler OR l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler))) WHERE r.d < p_depth AND (p_link_type IS NULL OR l.link_type = p_link_type) ), reached AS (SELECT DISTINCT tumbler FROM reach) SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8, c.chash FROM nexus.chunks_384 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN reached rd ON rd.tumbler = d.tumbler WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;

changeSet.author: nexus-7ndh3
changeSet.comment: search_graph_hop_768: add where(jsonb) chunk-metadata containment; replaces the 7-arg catalog-007 version
changeSet.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_graph_hop_768(vector, text[], text[], text, int, text, int); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_graph_hop_768( p_query vector(768), p_seeds text[], p_collections text[], p_link_type text, p_depth int, p_direction text, p_where jsonb, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8, chash text) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ WITH RECURSIVE reach(tumbler, d) AS ( SELECT s, 0 FROM unnest(p_seeds) AS s UNION SELECT CASE WHEN l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler THEN l.to_tumbler ELSE l.from_tumbler END, r.d + 1 FROM reach r JOIN nexus.catalog_links l ON ((p_direction = 'out' AND l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'in' AND l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'both' AND (l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler OR l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler))) WHERE r.d < p_depth AND (p_link_type IS NULL OR l.link_type = p_link_type) ), reached AS (SELECT DISTINCT tumbler FROM reach) SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8, c.chash FROM nexus.chunks_768 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN reached rd ON rd.tumbler = d.tumbler WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p_where IS NULL OR c.metadata @> p_where) ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_graph_hop_768(vector, text[], text[], text, int, text, jsonb, int); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_graph_hop_768( p_query vector(768), p_seeds text[], p_collections text[], p_link_type text, p_depth int, p_direction text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8, chash text) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ WITH RECURSIVE reach(tumbler, d) AS ( SELECT s, 0 FROM unnest(p_seeds) AS s UNION SELECT CASE WHEN l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler THEN l.to_tumbler ELSE l.from_tumbler END, r.d + 1 FROM reach r JOIN nexus.catalog_links l ON ((p_direction = 'out' AND l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'in' AND l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'both' AND (l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler OR l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler))) WHERE r.d < p_depth AND (p_link_type IS NULL OR l.link_type = p_link_type) ), reached AS (SELECT DISTINCT tumbler FROM reach) SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8, c.chash FROM nexus.chunks_768 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN reached rd ON rd.tumbler = d.tumbler WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;

changeSet.author: nexus-7ndh3
changeSet.comment: search_graph_hop_1024: add where(jsonb) chunk-metadata containment; replaces the 7-arg catalog-007 version
changeSet.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_graph_hop_1024(vector, text[], text[], text, int, text, int); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_graph_hop_1024( p_query vector(1024), p_seeds text[], p_collections text[], p_link_type text, p_depth int, p_direction text, p_where jsonb, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8, chash text) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ WITH RECURSIVE reach(tumbler, d) AS ( SELECT s, 0 FROM unnest(p_seeds) AS s UNION SELECT CASE WHEN l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler THEN l.to_tumbler ELSE l.from_tumbler END, r.d + 1 FROM reach r JOIN nexus.catalog_links l ON ((p_direction = 'out' AND l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'in' AND l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'both' AND (l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler OR l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler))) WHERE r.d < p_depth AND (p_link_type IS NULL OR l.link_type = p_link_type) ), reached AS (SELECT DISTINCT tumbler FROM reach) SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8, c.chash FROM nexus.chunks_1024 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN reached rd ON rd.tumbler = d.tumbler WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND (p_where IS NULL OR c.metadata @> p_where) ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
changeSet.rollback: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS nexus.search_graph_hop_1024(vector, text[], text[], text, int, text, jsonb, int); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.search_graph_hop_1024( p_query vector(1024), p_seeds text[], p_collections text[], p_link_type text, p_depth int, p_direction text, p_n int ) RETURNS TABLE(id text, content text, collection text, distance float8, chash text) LANGUAGE sql STABLE SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ WITH RECURSIVE reach(tumbler, d) AS ( SELECT s, 0 FROM unnest(p_seeds) AS s UNION SELECT CASE WHEN l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler THEN l.to_tumbler ELSE l.from_tumbler END, r.d + 1 FROM reach r JOIN nexus.catalog_links l ON ((p_direction = 'out' AND l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'in' AND l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler) OR (p_direction = 'both' AND (l.from_tumbler = r.tumbler OR l.to_tumbler = r.tumbler))) WHERE r.d < p_depth AND (p_link_type IS NULL OR l.link_type = p_link_type) ), reached AS (SELECT DISTINCT tumbler FROM reach) SELECT d.tumbler, c.chunk_text, c.collection, (c.embedding <=> p_query)::float8, c.chash FROM nexus.chunks_1024 c JOIN nexus.catalog_document_chunks m ON m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.collection = c.collection AND m.chash = c.chash JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id JOIN reached rd ON rd.tumbler = d.tumbler WHERE c.collection = ANY(p_collections) AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.embedding <=> p_query LIMIT p_n $$;
